  "description": "Emmix Global Limited offers consultancy on conceptualization, development and project management services for independent hotel, restaurant and bar owners. It is most ideal if Emmix global limited is involved from the early stages of a project to enable our team to guide the development of the project. This usually also to ensure the brand philosophy and values have influence over various facets of the project to deliver a holistic and exceptional finished product

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The ideal candidate will be responsible for the promotion of the hotel and services to potential guest and prospects in a bid to make sales
	Actively seek out new sales opportunities through relationship building, cold calling, and networking
	Be responsible for the sourcing of new clients while maintaining relationships with existing clients
	Responsible for lead generation for the company
	Arrange for business meetings and reach out to individuals and organizations.
	Achieve allocated sales revenue targets.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications
	The candidate must possess good communication, leadership, and negotiation skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Emmixglobal009@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Marketer Job at Emmix Global Limited




        
    

        
        Emmix Global Limited offers consultancy on conceptualization, development and project management services for independent hotel, restaurant and bar owners. It is most ideal if Emmix global limited is involved from the early stages of a project to enable our team to guide the development of the project. This usually also to ensure the brand philosophy and values have influence over various facets of the project to deliver a holistic and exceptional finished product

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The ideal candidate will be responsible for the promotion of the hotel and services to potential guest and prospects in a bid to make sales
	Actively seek out new sales opportunities through relationship building, cold calling, and networking
	Be responsible for the sourcing of new clients while maintaining relationships with existing clients
	Responsible for lead generation for the company
	Arrange for business meetings and reach out to individuals and organizations.
	Achieve allocated sales revenue targets.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications
	The candidate must possess good communication, leadership, and negotiation skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accounting Officer",
  "description": "Romkol Global Services is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Officer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, detail-oriented, and responsible Accounting Officer to manage daily accounting operations, inventory records, sales documentation, and payment reconciliation.


Key Responsibilities


	Keep inventory, sales, and accounting records of daily operations
	Document daily sales and payments accurately
	Track supplier payments against supplied goods
	Maintain updated records of bank transactions
	Reconcile daily sales against payments made by sales representatives and customers
	Prepare and organize reports and documentation as required


Requirements


	B.Sc or HND in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 1 year relevant experience
	Knowledge of Microsoft Excel is compulsory
	Strong attention to detail and record-keeping ability
	Ability to work under pressure with minimal supervision
	(Candidates willing to learn and undergo training are also encouraged to apply)


Work Schedule:


	Monday &ndash; Saturday
	8:00 AM &ndash; 6:00 PM


Reporting Line:


	The Accounting Officer will report directly to the Business Manager and work closely with the Auditor, Accountant, and Inventory Officers.


Salary
N80,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hirexus360@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accounting Officer Job at Romkol Global Services




        
    

        
        Romkol Global Services is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Officer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, detail-oriented, and responsible Accounting Officer to manage daily accounting operations, inventory records, sales documentation, and payment reconciliation.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Keep inventory, sales, and accounting records of daily operations
	Document daily sales and payments accurately
	Track supplier payments against supplied goods
	Maintain updated records of bank transactions
	Reconcile daily sales against payments made by sales representatives and customers
	Prepare and organize reports and documentation as required


Requirements


	B.Sc or HND in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 1 year relevant experience
	Knowledge of Microsoft Excel is compulsory
	Strong attention to detail and record-keeping ability
	Ability to work under pressure with minimal supervision
	(Candidates willing to learn and undergo training are also encouraged to apply)


Work Schedule:


	Monday – Saturday
	8:00 AM – 6:00 PM


Reporting Line:


	The Accounting Officer will report directly to the Business Manager and work closely with the Auditor, Accountant, and Inventory Officers.


Salary
N80,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Support Officer",
  "description": "Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support Officer

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Resolve customer issues and complaints in a professional and timely manner.
	Provide accurate information about products, services, and company policies.
	Process orders, returns, refunds, or account updates as needed.
	Document customer interactions and resolutions in internal systems.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: gymspadorisfit@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Customer Support Officer Job at Dorisfit




        
    

        
        Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Support Officer

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Resolve customer issues and complaints in a professional and timely manner.
	Provide accurate information about products, services, and company policies.
	Process orders, returns, refunds, or account updates as needed.
	Document customer interactions and resolutions in internal systems.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Location: Mowe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Collect, organize, and maintain company data and records
	Analyze data and prepare reports for management use
	Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and confidentiality
	Monitor and update databases and data management systems
	Identify data errors and provide corrective solutions
	Support operational and administrative teams with relevant data insights
	Generate periodic reports and performance summaries


Education &amp; Experience


	Minimum of B.Sc Degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Information Technology, or related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience as a Data Specialist or related role
	Strong analytical and organizational skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and data management tools
	Attention to detail and ability to handle confidential information.


Remuneration


	Salary will be discussed during the interview/on-site.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: stellarinternationalhr@gmail.com cc: stellarinternationaljobs@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Data Entry Officer Job at Stellar International Company Limited




        
    

        
        Stellar International Company Limited is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Ltd has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Entry Officer
Job Location: Mowe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Collect, organize, and maintain company data and records
	Analyze data and prepare reports for management use
	Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and confidentiality
	Monitor and update databases and data management systems
	Identify data errors and provide corrective solutions
	Support operational and administrative teams with relevant data insights
	Generate periodic reports and performance summaries


Education & Experience


	Minimum of B.Sc Degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Information Technology, or related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience as a Data Specialist or related role
	Strong analytical and organizational skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and data management tools
	Attention to detail and ability to handle confidential information.


Remuneration


	Salary will be discussed during the interview/on-site.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] cc: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Personnel",
  "description": "Aureole Consulting Limited - We are a leading Pan African HR Consulting organization. We specialize in talent acquisition services, Outsourcing Services, Executive Search, Social Media Job Advertisement, writing job and scholarship application documents, and HR consulting. Our aim is to revolutionize HR consulting in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Personnel

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented IT Personnel to support the company&rsquo;s daily IT operations, troubleshoot technical issues, maintain computer systems and networks, and provide timely technical support to staff.
	The ideal candidate should be able to ensure the smooth functioning of IT systems and contribute to overall operational efficiency within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide basic technical support to staff on computers, printers, internet, and software related issuses.
	Install and configure computer systems, applications, and devices.
	Troubleshoot hardware and software problems.
	Monitor and maintain office internet/network connectivity.
	Assist in setting up emails, systems, and user accounts.
	Ensure proper maintenance of company laptops, desktops, and other IT equipment.
	Ensure data backup and basic cybersecurity practices.
	Respond to IT -related issues in a timely manner.
	Support virtual meetings and office technology setup when needed.


Requirements


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Computer Science, IT, or related fields
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and general IT support.
	Ability to troubleshoot common technical issues.
	Good communication and problem-solving skills.
	Previous IT support experience is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@aureole.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

IT Personnel Job at Aureole Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Aureole Consulting Limited - We are a leading Pan African HR Consulting organization. We specialize in talent acquisition services, Outsourcing Services, Executive Search, Social Media Job Advertisement, writing job and scholarship application documents, and HR consulting. Our aim is to revolutionize HR consulting in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Personnel

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented IT Personnel to support the company’s daily IT operations, troubleshoot technical issues, maintain computer systems and networks, and provide timely technical support to staff.
	The ideal candidate should be able to ensure the smooth functioning of IT systems and contribute to overall operational efficiency within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide basic technical support to staff on computers, printers, internet, and software related issuses.
	Install and configure computer systems, applications, and devices.
	Troubleshoot hardware and software problems.
	Monitor and maintain office internet/network connectivity.
	Assist in setting up emails, systems, and user accounts.
	Ensure proper maintenance of company laptops, desktops, and other IT equipment.
	Ensure data backup and basic cybersecurity practices.
	Respond to IT -related issues in a timely manner.
	Support virtual meetings and office technology setup when needed.


Requirements


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Computer Science, IT, or related fields
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and general IT support.
	Ability to troubleshoot common technical issues.
	Good communication and problem-solving skills.
	Previous IT support experience is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
